depth.title: Model Depth
depth.description: Number of transformer layers. More layers = larger model but slower training.

timeBudget.title: Time Budget (seconds)
timeBudget.description: Training time budget in seconds. Default is 300 (5 minutes).

numShards.title: Number of Data Shards
numShards.description: Number of training data shards to download. More shards = more data variety but longer preparation.

deviceBatchSize.title: Device Batch Size
deviceBatchSize.description: Batch size per device. Reduce if running out of memory.
